name: bold_forward_interior

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.12+§7.5 + reference impl #333] A 太字 forward reference whose target 太字 occurs earlier in the same plain run but is NOT byte-adjacent to the bracket (の intervenes). Per §7.5 the most-recent plain occurrence is styled in place: the parser splices a detached decoration at [0,6) rendered as the bold run, while the directive bracket at [9,39) stays a forward reference that renders nothing. 太字 appears exactly once, now bold; serialize reproduces the source byte-for-byte (the decoration emits the bare literal, the bracket re-emits ［＃…］). Offsets from the §3 byte model.

source: 太字の［＃「太字」は太字］テスト

expected.serialize: 太字の［＃「太字」は太字］テスト
